mapper.sql: hrr.request_id, hrr.user_id, requester.login_id AS user_login_id, requester.name AS user_name, requester.email AS user_email, requester.phone AS user_phone, requester.role AS user_role, requester.status AS user_status, hrr.request_reason, hrr.status, hrr.reviewed_by AS reviewed_by_user_id, reviewer.login_id AS reviewed_by_login_id, reviewer.name AS reviewed_by_name, hrr.review_reason, hrr.created_at, hrr.updated_at, hrr.reviewed_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM host_role_requests hrr JOIN users requester ON requester.user_id = hrr.user_id LEFT JOIN users reviewer ON reviewer.user_id = hrr.reviewed_by WHERE hrr.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY hrr.request_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM host_role_requests hrr JOIN users requester ON requester.user_id = hrr.user_id LEFT JOIN users reviewer ON reviewer.user_id = hrr.reviewed_by WHERE hrr.user_id = #{userId} AND hrr.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY hrr.request_id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT hrr.request_id FROM host_role_requests hrr WHERE hrr.user_id = #{userId} AND hrr.status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY hrr.request_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM host_role_requests hrr JOIN users requester ON requester.user_id = hrr.user_id LEFT JOIN users reviewer ON reviewer.user_id = hrr.reviewed_by WHERE ( #{status} IS NULL OR hrr.status = #{status} ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN hrr.status = 'PENDING' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, hrr.created_at DESC, hrr.request_id DESC

SELECT
FROM host_role_requests hrr JOIN users requester ON requester.user_id = hrr.user_id LEFT JOIN users reviewer ON reviewer.user_id = hrr.reviewed_by WHERE hrr.request_id = #{requestId}

SELECT
FROM host_role_requests hrr JOIN users requester ON requester.user_id = hrr.user_id LEFT JOIN users reviewer ON reviewer.user_id = hrr.reviewed_by WHERE hrr.request_id = #{requestId} FOR UPDATE
